ddls:
CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file (e.g., B66AYB08.BST) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file, including any changes or improvements */,
  "file_size_kb" INTEGER /* Size of the file in kilobytes */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "download_link" TEXT /* Download link for the file */,
  "file_type" INTEGER /* Type of the file (e.g., firmware, driver) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file to ensure data integrity */,
  "compatibility_notes" TEXT /* Notes on compatibility with specific hardware or software */,
  "installation_instructions" TEXT /* Detailed instructions for installing the file */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the file (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_file_type FOREIGN KEY ("file_type") REFERENCES file_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type" INTEGER /* Type of the product (e.g., server, workstation) */,
  "product_model" TEXT /* Model of the product */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the product was released */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  "supported_os" TEXT /* Operating systems supported by the product */,
  "hardware_requirements" TEXT /* Hardware requirements for the product */,
  "product_status" TEXT /* Status of the product (e.g., active, discontinued) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_type FOREIGN KEY ("product_type") REFERENCES product_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_files" (
  "product_file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between a product and a file */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the file */,
  "is_latest" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the file is the latest version for the product */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the file was released for the product */,
  "recommended" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the file is recommended for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_files_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_files_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., product manager, engineer, support staff) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the file */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the access attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "release_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release note */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file the note is associated with */,
  "note_content" TEXT /* Content of the release note */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the note was last updated */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who authored the release note */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the file the release note is associated with */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the release note (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_release_notes_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_release_notes_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the file type (e.g., firmware, driver) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file upload */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file being uploaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "upload_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes by the uploader */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the upload (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_uploads_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the product type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can view files */,
  "can_download" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can download files */,
  "can_upload" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can upload files */,
  "can_manage" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can manage files and users */,
  "can_create_release_notes" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user can create release notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES users ("role")
)
